description: Frozen golden URLs for extraction A/B and Phase 0+ regression. Re-ingest with --validate and pinned models per docs/operations/ingestion-golden-sep-corpus.md.

items.why: Core canon; medium-long; dense dialogue citations — tests stable sectioning and claim grounding.
Very large hub entry; many internal links and subtopics — stress long-context extraction batching.
Heavy terminology and layered arguments — schema discipline and relation endpoints later.
Formal philosophy; notation and precision — failure mode: conflating object/meta language in claims.
Interpretive spread; long bibliography tail — tests claim span fidelity.
Dense systematic prose — medium-high difficulty summarization bias.
Metaphysical stacking; definitions-style passages — extraction of definitional vs interpretive claims.
Classic epistemology; clear argument structure — baseline for faithfulness checks.
Long entry; empiricism vs normativity — mixed claim types.
Political + metaphysical threads — cross-domain claims in one source.
Technical metaphysics and logic crossover — formal vocabulary density.
Idealism arguments; counterintuitive theses — hallucination risk on summaries.
Utilitarianism hub; policy-flavored claims — tests proportionality of confidence scores.
Political philosophy; structured principles — grouping/validation stress downstream.
Rhetorical style; aphoristic tone — extraction of non-literal claims.
Survey entry; multiple authors — disambiguation of attribution in claims.
Medieval theology + philosophy blend — domain tagging and span grounding.
Broad survey; many proper names — entity-heavy extraction.
Formal math; axioms — JSON structure and symbol-heavy passages.
Technical logic history — long dense paragraphs.
Philosophy of mind hub; cites empirical work — science-philosophy boundary claims.
Analytic metaphysics of mind — fine-grained distinctions.
Argument maps; objections/replies — relation extraction stress later.
Philosophy of language survey — polysemy and quotation.
Theories of truth; technical vocabulary — validation faithfulness sensitivity.
Metaphysics + physics crossover — long argumentative chains.
Normative political concepts — evaluative language calibration.
Social philosophy; politically sensitive claims — operator review and faithfulness.
Interdisciplinary references — citation-heavy sections.
Non-Western metaphysics; less familiar lexicon — translation/romanization noise.
Comparative structures; classical references — passage alignment difficulty.
Philosophy of biology — science-heavy prose.
Detailed scientific examples — long evidence passages.
Philosophy of physics; heavy formalism — max_tokens / truncation failure mode.
Dense debate structure — many undercutting objections.
AI ethics + CS overlap — timely vocabulary drift vs training cutoff issues.
Philosophy of CS; algorithms discussion — structured lists in source HTML.
Abstract/concrete information concepts — subtle definitional claims.
Philosophy of language on reference; self-referential examples — edge cases for spans.
Systematic aesthetics + metaphysics — long compound sentences.
Focused deep dive — tests whether shorter entries still hit json_repair / split paths.
Gutenberg pilot (plain-text canonicalization). Tests hard-wrapped book structure + heading segmentation.
Gutenberg pilot (shorter). Tests header/footer trimming + passage_id grounding strictness.
Gutenberg pilot (HTML URL shape). Ensures fetch prefers pg.txt and cleaning stays robust.

web_article_placeholders.note: Add 5–10 institutional web_article URLs that already completed with validate:true in Neon; keep stable for A/B.
web_article_placeholders.suggested_sql: SELECT id, source_url, completed_at FROM ingest_runs WHERE status = 'done' AND source_type = 'web_article' AND COALESCE((payload->>'validate') = 'true', false) AND completed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 10;
